title: glandularia microphylla
intro: Glandularia microphylla, also known as Rock Pink or Small White Verbena, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Glandularia microphylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for wound healing. Glandularia microphylla can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for various health benefits.
